title: Determination of Sulfides and Disulfides with Phenyliodosoacetate
author: KRISHNA K. VERMA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Jabalpur, Jabalpur 

  Manuscript received 17 April 1973; accepted 18 July 1973  

 A titrimetric procedure is described for determining organic disulfides and sulfides by oxida­tion with phenyliodosoacetate in dilate acetic acid. By applying a second method, sulfides and disulfides can be determined in presence of each other. Mercaptans, if present, can also be deter­mined. The procedure is precise to about ± 0.4%.
